feedItems.description: allocated £144.6m to Adult Social Care (≈£436 per resident)
allocated £38.1m to Environment & Streets (≈£115 per resident)
allocated £62.6m to Children's Social Care (≈£189 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £110 (4.7%) to £2465
